mapper.insert: INSERT INTO environments (id, name, mode, agent_ids_json, variables_json, metadata_json, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{mode, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.EnvironmentModeTypeHandler}, #{agentIds, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, #{variables, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, #{metadata, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE environments SET name = #{name}, mode = #{mode, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.EnvironmentModeTypeHandler}, agent_ids_json = #{agentIds, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, variables_json = #{variables, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, metadata_json = #{metadata, typeHandler=com.baafoo.server.storage.mybatis.JsonTypeHandler}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
